questionHtml:
What are functions of type I and type II alveolar pneumocytes?

  Type I Type II
A.   Produce surfactant   Exchange CO2
B.   Exchange CO2   Exchange CO2
C.   Phagocytic cells   Protective epithelial cells
D.   Carry out gas exchange   Produce surfactant
